routes.purpose: Open the staff-assisted booking queue and the default active booking case.
Open one booking case inside the same workspace shell with queue, compare, recovery, and settlement posture.

gatingRules: Staff assistance stays on the same supplier and capability tuple as the blocked patient route.
Selected slot and compare anchors remain visible while focus protection is active.
Accepted-for-processing posture may not present as booked until confirmation truth is confirmed.
Task completion and next-task launch remain governed by settlement posture.
